2026-03-17.reason: Free model config deployed. Fixed 5 test code issues: (1) Lesson pages use collapsible <button> sections, not <heading> elements — updated assertions to use getByRole('button', { name: /section/i }). (2) spaNavigate unreliable for lesson/quiz pages — switched to page.goto(). (3) Quiz submit test now uses API-based answer submission for reliability. (4) Added template reuse smoke test.
